member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.VerifyBusiness(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Business)
member.summary: It is used for activation and verification of Business.

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.UploadFile(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: It is used to upload a new file and get a url.

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.SaveFaq(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Faq)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "question" : "Biz Kimiz?", "questionEn": "Who Us?", "answer": "En iyisiyiz.", "answerEn": "We are the best.", "category": "Kayıt", "sortOrder": 1 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.UpdateFaq(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Faq)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "question": "Biz Kimiz?", "questionEn": "Who Us?", "answer": "En iyisiyiz.", "answerEn": "We are the best.", "category": "Kayıt", "sortOrder": 2 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.IndexBusiness
member.summary: It enables elasticsearch indexing of business records.

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetInfoById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business Info By Id (Brings only its own information)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business By Id (It also brings relationship table information)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetBusinessDetailsById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business Details By Id (Can be used for business detail page.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Business)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "name" : "Mert Kuaför", "address" : "Merkez, Eski Büyükdere Cd. 37/B, 34416 Kağıthane/İstanbul", "telephone" : "+905467335892", "latitude": "41.08611", "longitude": "29.00717", "city": "İstanbul", "province": "Kağıthane", "district": "Çeliktepe Mah.", "description": "Tesettür saç kesim, bakım, boya, kalıcı makyaj, microblading, manikür, pedikür, kaynak saç.", "descriptionEn": "Hijab haircut, care, coloring, permanent makeup, microblading, manicure, pedicure, hair welding.", "isFeatured": true, "logoUrl": "safdsf.jpg", "hasPromotion": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessPropertiesController.GetByBusinessIdWithKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get BusinessProperties By Business Id And Key

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessServicesController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.BusinessServiceModel)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name": "Saç Kesim", "nameEn": "Hair Cut", "spot": "Tam isteğinize göre bir saç kesime hazır olun.", "spotEn": "Get ready for a haircut just to your liking.", "minDuration": 30, "maxDuration": 45, "price": 150 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessServicesController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.BusinessServiceModel)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name": "Saç Kesim", "nameEn": "Hair Cut", "spot": "Tam isteğinize göre bir saç kesime hazır olun.", "spotEn": "Get ready for a haircut just to your liking.", "minDuration": 30, "maxDuration": 45, "price": 150, "isPopular": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.CommentController.GetBySessionUser
member.summary: Get CommentBy Session User (User or Business)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.CommentController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Comment)
member.summary: Save Comment (İşyeri cevabı ise replyId dolu olacak. Cevap verilen yorumun id si yazılması yeterli. Kullanıcı yorum yapmışsa businessId dolu olmalı.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.DiscountController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Discount)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "businessId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "isActive": true, "description": "Bugün tüm servislerde", "descriptionEn": "Every services today", "rate": 20, "type": 0, "colorCode": "#335657" }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.DiscountController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Discount)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "isActive": false, "description": "Bugün tüm servislerde", "descriptionEn": "Every services today", "rate": 20, "type": 0, "colorCode": "#335657" }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.FavoriteController.Get
member.summary: Get Favorite Businesses By Session User

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "userId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "businessId": null, "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin.", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin.", "type": 0, "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SaveAllUsers(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification All Users (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin." "descriptionEn": "Welcome to CareGarden." "type": 0 "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SaveAllBusinesses(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification All Businesses (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin." "descriptionEn": "Welcome to CareGarden." "type": 0 "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SetRead(CareGardenApiV1.Model.RequestModel.IdListSearchModel)
member.summary: Notification Set Read ({} boş gönderildiğinde session daki kullanıcının tüm bildirimleri okundu yapar.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.WorkerController.GetByBusinessServiceId(System.String)
member.summary: Get Worker By Business Service Id

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.WorkerController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.Worker)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name" : "Mert DEMİRKIRAN", "title" : "Hair Stylist", "path" : "mert.jpg", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceIds" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001", "mondayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "tuesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "wednesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "thursdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "fridayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "saturdayWorkHours" : "09:00-13:00", "sundayWorkHours" : null, "isActive" : true }

member.name: T:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.BirDakikaIcindeOnayKoduMesaji
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bir dakika içinde birden fazla onay kodu alamazsınız..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.BuAlaniBosBirakmayiniz
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bu alanı boş bırakmayınız..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ElasticIndexlemeIslemiBasladi
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Elastic indexleme işlemi arkaplanda başlamıştır..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ElasticSunucusuAktifDegil
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Elastic server is not active..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Geçerli bir isim giriniz..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lütfen geçerli bir mail giriniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.GecerliMailTelefonMesaji
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lütfen geçerli bir mail veya telefon numarası giriniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.GecerliTelefonMesaji
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lütfen geçerli bir telefon numarası giriniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.GeriBildirimGonderildi
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Thank you for your feedback..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.GeriBildirimGonderilemedi
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Geri bildirim gönderilemedi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz maile ait kullanıcı bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz maile ait kullanıcı sistemde kayıtlı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz maile ait şirket bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz telefon numarasına ait kullanıcı sistemde kayıtlı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.GirdiginizTelefonNumarasinaAitSirketKayitli
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The company belonging to the phone number you entered is registered in the system..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girilen bilgilere ait kullanıcı bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevuya 9 saat kala randevuyu iptal etmek güvenilirliğinizi azaltır. İptal etmek istiyor musunuz?.
